structure.explanation: Preposisi 'Upon' yang diikuti langsung oleh tindakan aktif mensyaratkan penggunaan gerund (verb-ing), yaitu 'entering'.

structure.questionText: _______ the meticulous financial audit, the independent firm presented its final report to the board of directors.
structure.explanation: Perfect participle aktif 'Having completed' digunakan untuk menunjukkan bahwa subjek (the independent firm) telah tuntas menyelesaikan audit sebelum mempresentasikan laporan.

structure.questionText: _______ by the intricate geometrical patterns, the young mathematician spent years trying to formulate a unifying theorem.
structure.explanation: Matematikawan tersebut 'dibuat takjub' (pasif). Past participle 'Fascinated' digunakan untuk membentuk frasa partisipial yang memodifikasi subjek kalimat tersebut.

structure.questionText: Individuals _______ to participate in the high-altitude acclimatization study must undergo rigorous cardiovascular screening.
structure.explanation: Kata 'wishing' mereduksi klausa aktif 'who wish'. Frasa ini memodifikasi kata benda jamak 'Individuals'.

structure.questionText: The high-frequency electromagnetic waves _______ from the distant pulsar provide crucial data regarding stellar evolution.
structure.explanation: Klausa relatif aktif 'which emanate' (yang memancar) direduksi menjadi present participle 'emanating' untuk menjelaskan subjek 'The... waves'.

structure.questionText: When _______ a long-span suspension bridge, civil engineers must account for extreme aerodynamic instability.
structure.explanation: Konjungsi 'When' dapat diikuti oleh present participle 'designing' (mereduksi 'When they are designing') jika subjek di klausa bawahan dan klausa utama sama.

structure.questionText: The international regulatory board insists that the chemical manufacturer _______ all operations until the environmental assessment is complete.
structure.explanation: Kata kerja 'insists' mensyaratkan penggunaan subjunctive. Oleh karenanya, kata kerja dasar 'halt' digunakan tanpa memandang subjeknya tunggal.

structure.questionText: It is absolutely vital that the injured athlete _______ to the field before fully recovering from the concussion.
structure.explanation: Kata sifat 'vital' memicu subjunctive mood. Dalam bentuk negatif, kata 'not' diletakkan langsung sebelum kata kerja dasar 'return' (tanpa auxiliary 'does').

structure.questionText: _______ the archaeologists found buried deep beneath the Mayan ruins profoundly contradicts established historical timelines.
structure.explanation: Klausa kata benda yang berfungsi sebagai subjek diawali dengan 'What'. 'What the archaeologists found' berarti 'Hal yang ditemukan para arkeolog'.

structure.questionText: The ultimate success of the Mars colonization mission depends entirely on _______ the crew can sustain a closed-loop ecological life support system.
structure.explanation: Preposisi 'on' diikuti oleh klausa kata benda. Susunan yang benar untuk klausa tanya dalam kalimat adalah kata tanya (how effectively) + subjek (the crew) + verb (can sustain).

structure.questionText: The legal counsel strongly advised that the embattled CEO _______ immediately to prevent further damage to the company's stock price.
structure.explanation: Kata 'advised' memicu subjunctive mood di klausa 'that'. Kata kerja bentuk dasar (bare infinitive) 'resign' harus digunakan.

structure.questionText: _______ the expansion of the universe is actively accelerating was confirmed by observing distant supernovae.
structure.explanation: Kata hubung 'That' mengawali klausa kata benda yang utuh ('That the expansion... accelerating') untuk berfungsi sebagai subjek utama kalimat (Bahwa ekspansi alam semesta...).

structure.questionText: The steering committee's recommendation that the obsolete factory machinery _______ with automated robotics met strong union resistance.
structure.explanation: Kata benda 'recommendation' memicu subjunctive dalam klausa 'that'. Karena mesin tersebut dikenai tindakan pasif (diganti), digunakan bentuk dasar to be pasif 'be replaced'.

structure.questionText: The prestigious architectural commission will be awarded to _______ submits the most sustainable and energy-efficient design.
structure.explanation: Meskipun berada setelah preposisi 'to', klausa berikutnya membutuhkan subjek untuk predikat 'submits'. 'Whoever' berfungsi sebagai subjek klausa tersebut ('siapapun yang mengajukan').

structure.questionText: _______ the controversial artificial intelligence policy will be fully implemented by the end of the year remains highly uncertain.
structure.explanation: Klausa kata benda yang menyatakan pilihan/ketidakpastian dan berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat biasanya diawali dengan 'Whether' (Apakah), bukan 'If'.

structure.questionText: It is absolutely imperative that the volatile liquid specimen _______ at sub-zero temperatures during the entire transportation process.
structure.explanation: Kata 'imperative' menuntut penggunaan subjunctive. Subjek tunggal 'the... specimen' harus diikuti kata kerja dasar tanpa 's/es', yaitu 'remain'.

structure.questionText: The more intricate the biological mechanism of a virus is, _______ for immunologists to develop an effective vaccine.
structure.explanation: Pola perbandingan ganda (double comparative) menggunakan struktur 'The + comparative..., the + comparative...'. Frasa 'the harder it is' melengkapi secara paralel frasa pertama.

structure.questionText: Not only _______ substantial amounts of renewable energy, but the new solar array also serves as an architectural landmark.
options: does the new solar array generate
is the new solar array generating
structure.explanation: Korelasi 'Not only' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Auxiliary 'does' ditempatkan mendahului subjek tunggal 'the new solar array'.

structure.questionText: Neither the chief structural engineer nor his subordinate technicians _______ aware of the microscopic fissures in the concrete foundation.
structure.explanation: Dalam struktur 'Neither... nor...', kata kerja menyesuaikan dengan subjek yang lebih dekat kepadanya. 'technicians' adalah jamak, maka to be yang benar adalah 'were'.

structure.questionText: The ideal candidate for the directorship must demonstrate both exceptional leadership skills _______ a profound understanding of international corporate law.
structure.explanation: Struktur konjungsi korelatif paralel untuk 'both' adalah selalu pasangannya, yaitu 'and'.

structure.questionText: The radical new aerodynamic design of the vehicle is not so much an aesthetic choice _______ a highly calculated engineering necessity to reduce drag.
structure.explanation: Pola perbandingan khusus ini adalah 'not so much X as Y', yang berarti 'bukan X melainkan Y'. 'as it is' melengkapi struktur ini agar sejajar.

structure.questionText: The rigorous academic syllabus is designed to challenge students intellectually, to foster independent critical thinking, and _______ collaboration on complex projects.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah pengujian paralelisme. Karena dua elemen sebelumnya menggunakan to-infinitive ('to challenge', 'to foster'), elemen ketiga juga harus berupa 'to encourage'.

structure.questionText: The closer an orbiting planet is to its host star, _______ its complete orbital period is expected to be.
structure.explanation: Perbandingan ganda mengharuskan klausa kedua dimulai dengan 'The + comparative', yaitu 'the shorter'.

structure.questionText: The tonal linguistic structure of Mandarin Chinese is vastly different from _______ English or French.
structure.explanation: Untuk menghindari pengulangan subjek tunggal 'The tonal linguistic structure', kita menggunakan kata ganti demonstratif 'that of' saat membandingkannya dengan bahasa lain.

structure.questionText: The multinational corporation's board of directors would rather invest heavily in renewable energy ventures _______ to rely on volatile fossil fuel markets.
structure.explanation: Struktur 'would rather' (lebih suka) diikuti oleh bare infinitive (invest). Kata pembandingnya adalah 'than' yang juga harus diikuti oleh bare infinitive (continue) agar paralel.

structure.questionText: Critics have praised the director's latest cinematic masterpiece as brilliant, evocative, and _______.
structure.explanation: Struktur paralel: 'brilliant' dan 'evocative' adalah kata sifat (adjectives). Maka elemen terakhir haruslah frasa kata sifat, yaitu 'profoundly moving'.

structure.questionText: Deep within the unmapped subterranean cave system _______ several unverified species of bioluminescent arachnids.
structure.explanation: Inversi lokatif. Subjek sebenarnya yang berada di belakang adalah 'several unverified species' (jamak). Oleh karena itu, kata kerja dasar jamak 'exist' digunakan.

structure.questionText: A massive cluster of high-intensity supergiant stars _______ the inner ring of the newly photographed galaxy.
structure.explanation: Subjek kalimat adalah 'A massive cluster' (tunggal), sedangkan 'of... stars' hanyalah frasa preposisi. Maka kata kerjanya harus tunggal, yaitu berakhiran -s ('illuminates').

structure.questionText: The number of critically endangered amphibian species in this specific geographical region _______ dramatically over the past two decades.
structure.explanation: Frasa subjek 'The number of' selalu dianggap tunggal (berbeda dengan 'A number of' yang jamak). Maka dari itu, auxiliary tunggal 'has' digunakan dalam present perfect tense.

structure.questionText: _______ the overwhelming empirical evidence presented by the prosecution, the jury ultimately acquitted the defendant on all charges.
structure.explanation: 'Despite' adalah preposisi penunjuk kontras yang diikuti oleh frasa kata benda ('the overwhelming empirical evidence...'). Kata hubung seperti 'Although' memerlukan klausa dengan subjek dan kata kerja utuh.

structure.questionText: _______ a prominent figure in the civil rights movement, Dr. King delivered speeches that resonated globally.
structure.explanation: Kata 'As' berfungsi sebagai preposisi yang menunjukkan peran atau identitas ('Sebagai seorang tokoh terkemuka...'), membentuk frasa apositif yang menjelaskan subjek Dr. King.

structure.questionText: To ensure maximum operational efficiency, the facility manager had the specialized maintenance crew _______ the outdated ventilation system over the weekend.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah struktur causative 'had' aktif ('had someone do something'). Kata kerja dasar tanpa 'to' (bare infinitive), yaitu 'upgrade', digunakan setelah objek agen (crew).

structure.questionText: _______ the implementation of the new automated data management software, processing massive payrolls was a significantly tedious endeavor.
structure.explanation: 'Prior to' adalah frasa preposisi baku yang bersinonim dengan 'before' dan dengan tepat diletakkan sebelum frasa kata benda.

structure.questionText: Viewed through a highly powerful ground-based telescope, _______ to be composed entirely of ice and cosmic dust.
options: it is Saturn's rings that appear
structure.explanation: Frasa partisipial di awal ('Viewed...') memodifikasi subjek klausa utama. Subjek yang logis untuk 'Dilihat melalui teleskop' adalah 'Saturn's rings', yang kemudian langsung diikuti kata kerjanya 'appear'.

structure.questionText: _______ a sudden, unprecedented drop in atmospheric pressure, the experienced sea captain ordered the crew to immediately secure the sails.
structure.explanation: 'Because of' adalah preposisi yang diikuti oleh frasa kata benda ('a sudden... drop...'), berbeda dengan konjungsi 'Because/Since/As' yang harus diikuti oleh subjek dan predikat yang utuh.

structure.questionText: Such _______ the sheer complexity of the human neural network that neuroscientists have only mapped a fraction of its pathways.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'Such is / Such are' di awal kalimat adalah bentuk inversi untuk menekankan derajat atau intensitas. Karena subjeknya adalah 'the sheer complexity' (tunggal), maka 'is' adalah yang tepat.

structure.questionText: Only after the investigative journalists published their groundbreaking exposé _______ the severity of the corporate embezzlement.
structure.explanation: Frasa waktu yang bersifat restriktif 'Only after' di awal kalimat mensyaratkan terjadinya inversi pada klausa utama. Auxiliary verb 'did' harus mendahului subjek 'the general public'.

structure.questionText: It is absolutely imperative that the fluctuating vital signs of the comatose patient _______ continuously by the intensive care unit staff.
structure.explanation: Kata sifat 'imperative' memicu penggunaan subjunctive mood dalam klausa 'that'. Karena tanda vital 'dipantau' (makna pasif), maka bentuk dasar pasif 'be monitored' harus digunakan.

structure.questionText: _______ entirely of synthetic compounds, the newly developed insulation material offers unprecedented resistance to extreme thermal dynamics.
structure.explanation: Material tersebut 'terdiri dari' atau 'disusun oleh' (pasif). Past participle 'Composed' digunakan untuk mereduksi klausa keterangan (Because it is composed entirely of...).

structure.questionText: The more precisely a particle's position is determined, _______ its momentum can be known, according to Heisenberg's uncertainty principle.
structure.explanation: Aturan perbandingan ganda (double comparative) mengharuskan keseimbangan struktur 'The + comparative... , the + comparative...'. Frasa 'the less accurately' berpasangan sempurna dengan 'The more precisely'.

structure.questionText: The structural integrity of the dam _______ critically compromised, the authorities ordered the immediate evacuation of all downstream settlements.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah 'absolute phrase' yang memberikan konteks alasan. Karena kompromi struktural terjadi *sebelum* perintah evakuasi, bentuk perfect participle 'having been' adalah yang paling tepat secara kronologis.

structure.questionText: Just beneath the Earth's crust _______ a churning mantle of semi-solid rock that continually drives continental drift.
structure.explanation: Inversi lokatif terjadi karena kalimat diawali dengan frasa preposisi tempat ('Just beneath...'). Subjek aslinya adalah 'a churning mantle' (tunggal), maka kata kerja yang benar adalah 'exists'.

structure.questionText: Had the diplomatic delegates not reached a last-minute consensus, the prolonged trade embargo _______ the region's fragile economy.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah pengandaian tipe 3 yang diinversi ('Had the delegates not reached...' = 'If the delegates had not reached...'). Klausa utamanya harus mengikuti pola masa lampau yang tidak nyata: 'would have + past participle'.

structure.questionText: _______ the intricate hieroglyphics could finally be deciphered was a monumental triumph for the international team of Egyptologists.
structure.explanation: Klausa kata benda (noun clause) utuh 'That the intricate hieroglyphics could finally be deciphered' berfungsi sebagai subjek utama kalimat. Kata hubung 'That' digunakan untuk menyatakan fakta/pernyataan.

structure.questionText: The revolutionary surgical technique is acclaimed not only for minimizing patient recovery time _______ significantly reducing the risk of postoperative infection.
structure.explanation: Konjungsi korelatif 'not only' selalu berpasangan dengan 'but also'. Karena frasa pertama diawali preposisi 'for' (for minimizing...), elemen kedua juga harus paralel ('but also for significantly reducing...').

structure.questionText: Despite the relentless media scrutiny, there _______ a surprisingly resilient support base for the controversial legislative reform.
structure.explanation: Dalam struktur ekspletif dengan 'there', kata kerja mengikuti subjek yang datang setelahnya. Subjek 'a surprisingly resilient support base' adalah tunggal, sehingga to be/verb tunggal 'remains' yang digunakan.

structure.questionText: Seldom _______ such a profound disruption in the global supply chain due to a single localized maritime incident.
structure.explanation: Adverbia negatif 'Seldom' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Polanya adalah Auxiliary + Subject + Main Verb. Jadi, 'has the industry witnessed' adalah susunan yang tepat.

structure.questionText: The board of directors mandates that any proposed modifications to the corporate charter _______ rigorous legal scrutiny prior to a final vote.
structure.explanation: Kata kerja 'mandates' mengharuskan klausa 'that' di belakangnya menggunakan subjunctive mood. Kata kerja dasar (bare infinitive) 'undergo' digunakan terlepas dari subjek jamak 'modifications'.

structure.questionText: _______ the necessary aerodynamic modifications, the prototype aircraft failed to achieve supersonic speeds during its maiden flight.
structure.explanation: Present participle 'Lacking' membentuk frasa partisipial aktif yang berarti 'Karena tidak memiliki'. Frasa ini memodifikasi subjek utama kalimat, 'the prototype aircraft'.

structure.questionText: A prolific and highly decorated playwright, _______ consistently pushed the boundaries of traditional theatrical narrative.
options: the innovative works of Arthur Miller
structure.explanation: Frasa apositif 'A prolific and highly decorated playwright' menjelaskan seseorang. Oleh karena itu, subjek utama yang langsung mengikutinya haruslah orang tersebut ('Arthur Miller'), bukan karya-karyanya.

structure.questionText: No sooner had the meteorologist issued the severe tornado warning _______ the sirens began wailing across the municipality.
structure.explanation: Pasangan konjungsi korelatif untuk 'No sooner', yang menunjukkan urutan waktu sangat cepat antara dua kejadian, adalah 'than'.

structure.questionText: The newly elected governor would rather that the controversial infrastructural budget _______ reallocated to public education initiatives.
structure.explanation: Konstruksi 'would rather' diikuti klausa dengan subjek berbeda (the budget) mengharuskan penggunaan past subjunctive (pengandaian). Untuk to be, bentuk yang baku dalam subjunctive TOEFL adalah 'were'.

structure.questionText: The broader the bandwidth of the fiber-optic cable, _______ the volume of data that can be transmitted instantaneously.
structure.explanation: Komparatif ganda membutuhkan struktur 'The + comparative adjective/adverb'. 'the greater' melengkapi keseimbangan dengan klausa pertama 'The broader'.

structure.questionText: _______ completely isolated from mainland predators for millennia, the island's avian population evolved without the ability to fly.
structure.explanation: Perfect participle pasif 'Having been' menunjukkan keadaan isolasi tersebut telah terjadi dan tuntas (selama ribuan tahun) mendahului atau menyebabkan proses evolusi mereka di masa lampau.

structure.questionText: Should the primary containment vessel breach, the automated lockdown protocol _______ to seal all auxiliary sectors.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah conditional tipe 1 dengan inversi 'Should' (pengganti 'If the primary containment vessel breaches'). Klausa utamanya menggunakan future tense aktif 'will initiate' (protokol akan memulai/berjalan).

structure.questionText: _______ the intricate biological mechanisms underlying cellular aging remains one of the most formidable challenges in modern gerontology.
structure.explanation: Gerund 'Understanding' (memahami) bertindak sebagai kata benda abstrak yang menjadi subjek kalimat dan langsung diikuti oleh objeknya ('the intricate biological mechanisms'). 'To understand' juga bisa benar, tapi biasanya 'Understanding' lebih lazim untuk general statement tanpa The di depannya jika diikuti objek langsung.

structure.questionText: The committee strongly suggests that the zoning laws _______ to allow for mixed-use commercial and residential developments.
structure.explanation: Kata 'suggests' memicu aturan subjunctive dalam klausa 'that'. Karena undang-undang (laws) dikenai tindakan (diamandemen/pasif), maka digunakan kata kerja dasar pasif 'be amended'.

structure.questionText: Barely _______ the complex mathematical theorem when his colleague pointed out a fatal flaw in the third postulate.
structure.explanation: Adverbia negatif 'Barely' memaksa kalimat diinversi. Saat berpasangan dengan 'when' untuk merujuk pada dua aksi lampau yang berurutan cepat, past perfect ('had + subjek + past participle') umumnya digunakan.

structure.questionText: The phenomenon of quantum entanglement, _______ particles remain interconnected regardless of distance, defies classical Newtonian physics.
structure.explanation: 'Whereby' adalah konjungsi relatif formal yang berarti 'melalui mana' atau 'di mana' (dalam arti suatu proses/kondisi). Ini paling tepat untuk menghubungkan proses fenomena dengan dampaknya.

structure.questionText: _______ a sharp decline in international tourism, the coastal economy managed to sustain itself through robust agricultural exports.
structure.explanation: Preposisi 'In spite of' (meskipun) diikuti oleh frasa kata benda ('a sharp decline...'). 'Although' dan 'Even though' memerlukan subjek dan kata kerja yang utuh.

structure.questionText: The more resistant the bacterial strain becomes to conventional antibiotics, _______ for researchers to discover alternative antimicrobial agents.
structure.explanation: Komparatif ganda membutuhkan pola 'The + comparative... the + comparative...'. 'the more urgent it is' menyelaraskan keseimbangan gramatikal dengan anak kalimat pertama.

structure.questionText: Scattered across the desolate, windswept tundra _______ the skeletal remains of ancient megafauna that perished during the last Ice Age.
structure.explanation: Inversi lokatif karena kalimat diawali dengan frasa tempat/partisipial ('Scattered across...'). Subjek utama yang berada di belakang adalah 'the skeletal remains' (jamak), maka kata kerja jamak 'lie' (terletak) digunakan.

structure.questionText: Never before in the recorded history of the stock exchange _______ such a precipitous and unexplainable drop in market capitalization.
structure.explanation: Adverbia negatif 'Never before' memicu inversi. Susunan ekspletif 'there has been' dibalik menjadi 'has there been' untuk melengkapi present perfect tense yang cocok dengan konteks 'in the recorded history'.

structure.questionText: It is of the utmost importance that any employee exposed to the hazardous substance _______ immediate medical decontamination.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'of the utmost importance that' mengharuskan penggunaan klausa subjunctive. Kata kerja dasar 'seek' (tanpa s) digunakan meskipun subjeknya 'any employee' (tunggal).

structure.questionText: _______ the intricate legal jargon contained within the hundred-page contract, the entrepreneur unwittingly signed away the rights to her own invention.
structure.explanation: Present participle aktif 'Misunderstanding' (Karena salah memahami) membentuk klausa keterangan yang logis menjelaskan tindakan subjek 'the entrepreneur'.

structure.questionText: _______ what constitutes true consciousness has been debated by philosophers and neuroscientists for centuries.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'The question of' berfungsi sebagai subjek kalimat dan dapat diikuti secara logis oleh klausa kata benda 'what constitutes true consciousness' (pertanyaan mengenai apa yang membentuk...).

structure.questionText: Were the atmospheric pressure on the summit any lower, the climbers _______ supplemental oxygen immediately upon arrival.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah inversi dari conditional tipe 2 ('If the atmospheric pressure were any lower...'). Klausa utamanya mensyaratkan 'would + verb', yaitu 'would require'.

structure.questionText: The independent oversight committee requires that the financial records of the nonprofit organization _______ completely transparent and accessible to the public.
structure.explanation: Kata 'requires' memicu penggunaan subjunctive mood dalam klausa 'that'. Oleh karena itu, bentuk dasar dari to be, yaitu 'be', harus digunakan.

structure.questionText: Not only _______ to drastic climate change, but the rapid deforestation of the Amazon also destroys critical habitats for uncontacted indigenous tribes.
structure.explanation: Penggunaan 'Not only' di awal menuntut inversi. Auxiliary 'does' ditempatkan sebelum subjek panjang 'the rapid deforestation' dan diikuti kata kerja dasar 'contribute'.

structure.questionText: _______ the relentless cyberattacks on its central servers, the multinational bank managed to safeguard all encrypted customer data.
structure.explanation: Preposisi 'Despite' menunjukkan pertentangan (konsesi) dan diikuti langsung oleh frasa kata benda ('the relentless cyberattacks...').

structure.questionText: The intricate Gothic cathedral, _______ construction spanned over three centuries, remains the architectural crown jewel of the historic city.
structure.explanation: Kata ganti relatif kepemilikan 'whose' dibutuhkan untuk menunjukkan bahwa konstruksi tersebut adalah milik/bagian dari katedral ('whose construction' = the construction of which).

structure.questionText: Only by radically altering their current fiscal policy _______ to avert a catastrophic national default in the upcoming quarter.
structure.explanation: Frasa syarat restriktif 'Only by + gerund' di awal klausa memicu inversi. Modal 'can' harus mendahului subjek 'the government'.

structure.questionText: The meticulous restoration of the Renaissance fresco was deemed highly successful, not so much because of the modern techniques used _______ the artist's dedication to historical accuracy.
structure.explanation: Korelasi idiomatik 'not so much [X] as [Y]' membandingkan dua hal setara. Karena X adalah 'because of the modern techniques', Y harus berbentuk paralel, yaitu 'as because of the artist's dedication'.

structure.questionText: _______ the unexpected resignation of the lead project manager, the software development team struggled to meet the rigid quarterly deadlines.
structure.explanation: Preposisi partisipial 'Following' digunakan di sini dalam arti 'Menyusul' atau 'Setelah', yang mengawali frasa keterangan alasan/waktu di depan kalimat.

structure.questionText: Had the medieval scholars not painstakingly translated the ancient Greek texts into Arabic, much of classical philosophical thought _______ to history.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah pengandaian bersyarat tipe 3 (inversi). 'Had... not translated' berpasangan dengan bentuk past perfect pengandaian 'would have been lost' (pasif: akan telah hilang).

structure.questionText: Embedded deeply within the meteorite's crystalline matrix _______ microscopic traces of complex amino acids, suggesting the possibility of extraterrestrial life.
structure.explanation: Inversi lokatif. Subjek aslinya yang berada setelah kata kerja adalah 'microscopic traces' (jamak), sehingga kata kerja pasif yang tepat dan bersesuaian dengan plural adalah 'were found'.

structure.questionText: The primary objective of the monetary policy is to stabilize the inflation rate, encourage foreign investment, and _______ steady economic growth.
structure.explanation: Paralelisme. Polanya adalah 'to stabilize... (to) encourage... and (to) promote'. Penggunaan awalan 'to' opsional pada elemen berikutnya, sehingga bentuk dasar 'promote' tepat.

structure.questionText: It is crucial that the delicate chemical compound _______ away from direct ultraviolet light to prevent spontaneous degradation.
structure.explanation: Adjektiva 'crucial' memicu subjunctive mood. Makna yang dikehendaki adalah pasif (senyawa dijauhkan/disimpan jauh), maka digunakan bentuk dasar pasif 'be kept'.

structure.questionText: _______ the massive influx of raw data generated by the sensory network, the artificial intelligence model required an upgrade to its processing architecture.
structure.explanation: Preposisi 'Given' berarti 'Mengingat' atau 'Mempertimbangkan'. Ia secara gramatikal tepat diletakkan di depan frasa kata benda ('the massive influx...') untuk memberikan alasan/kondisi.

structure.questionText: Scarcely _______ the fragile treaty between the two warring nations when sporadic border skirmishes threatened to ignite a full-scale conflict.
structure.explanation: Adverbia negatif 'Scarcely' memicu inversi, dan umumnya menggunakan past perfect tense ('had + subjek + verb 3') untuk menekankan aksi yang terjadi sesaat sebelum aksi lainnya.

structure.questionText: The less dense the interstellar medium is in a particular region of the galaxy, _______ for cosmic rays to propagate without deflection.
structure.explanation: Struktur komparatif ganda (The + comparative... the + comparative...). Frasa 'the easier it is' berpasangan dengan 'The less dense' pada klausa awal.

structure.questionText: _______ extensively regarding the ethical implications of artificial superintelligence, the visiting philosopher captivated the university audience.
structure.explanation: Perfect participle aktif 'Having written' (Karena telah menulis secara ekstensif) menunjukkan tindakan yang selesai mendahului klausa utama, dan dilakukan oleh subjek yang sama (the philosopher).

structure.questionText: Under no circumstances _______ authorization codes to third-party vendors without the explicit consent of the Chief Information Officer.
structure.explanation: Frasa restriktif negatif 'Under no circumstances' mengharuskan inversi subjek dan auxiliary. Modal 'should' diletakkan mendahului subjek 'employees'.

structure.questionText: The pharmaceutical board insists that the clinical trial data _______ immediately to an independent auditing firm to ensure transparency.
structure.explanation: Kata 'insists' mensyaratkan subjunctive mood dalam anak klausa 'that'. Data tersebut harus diserahkan (pasif), sehingga digunakan bentuk dasar pasif 'be submitted'.

structure.questionText: _______ to maintain its monopoly on the regional telecom market, the conglomerate initiated a series of aggressive corporate acquisitions.
structure.explanation: Present participle 'Seeking' (Berusaha) membentuk klausa partisipial aktif yang menjelaskan tujuan atau tindakan subjek utama kalimat (the conglomerate).

structure.questionText: Not until the orbital telescope was recalibrated by the engineering team _______ the faint, distant galaxy lurking behind the nebula.
structure.explanation: Ekspresi negatif 'Not until' yang memimpin klausa utama mensyaratkan inversi pada klausa utama tersebut. Modal auxiliary 'could' harus mendahului subjek 'the astronomers'.

structure.questionText: The archaeological expedition unearthed dozens of ancient ceramic vessels, _______ completely intact despite the passage of millennia.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini membutuhkan klausa relatif (adjective clause) untuk menghubungkan klausa utama dengan anak kalimat. Frasa preposisi + relative pronoun 'many of which' tepat digunakan sebagai subjek dari klausa relatif tersebut, diikuti kata kerja 'were'.

structure.questionText: Had the engineering team identified the microscopic flaw in the structural blueprint, the catastrophic bridge collapse _______.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah pengandaian tipe 3 yang diinversi ('Had the engineering team identified...' = 'If the engineering team had identified...'). Klausa utamanya memerlukan struktur 'would have + past participle'. Karena bermakna pasif (keruntuhan dihindari), digunakan 'would have been averted'.

structure.questionText: Nowhere in the vast expanse of the cosmos _______ a celestial body that perfectly replicates the atmospheric conditions of Earth.
structure.explanation: Adverbia penunjuk tempat negatif 'Nowhere' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Susunan yang benar adalah auxiliary + subjek + verb. Karena konteksnya adalah penemuan dari dulu hingga kini, present perfect tense ('have astronomers discovered') adalah yang paling tepat.

structure.questionText: The mysterious Nazca Lines in Peru are believed _______ by ancient peoples for astronomical or ceremonial purposes.
structure.explanation: Pola 'is/are believed + to infinitive' digunakan untuk menyatakan keyakinan umum. Karena garis-garis tersebut 'dibuat' (pasif) di masa lampau (mendahului masa kini), bentuk 'perfect passive infinitive' (to have been created) harus digunakan.

structure.questionText: _______ the expansion of the universe is not only continuing but actively accelerating was confirmed by observing distant supernovae.
structure.explanation: Klausa kata benda (noun clause) utuh dapat bertindak sebagai subjek kalimat. Kata hubung 'That' digunakan untuk menyatakan suatu fakta (Bahwa ekspansi alam semesta...). Seluruh klausa 'That the expansion... accelerating' berfungsi sebagai subjek untuk predikat 'was confirmed'.

structure.questionText: The innovative curriculum aims to cultivate not only rigorous analytical skills _______ a deep appreciation for the humanities.
structure.explanation: Pasangan konjungsi korelatif baku untuk 'not only' adalah selalu 'but also'. Ini digunakan untuk menghubungkan dua elemen yang sejajar (dalam hal ini frasa kata benda).

structure.questionText: Approximately two-thirds of the city's critical water infrastructure _______ severely damaged during the unprecedented seismic event.
structure.explanation: Dalam struktur pecahan/persentase ('Two-thirds of...'), kata kerja menyesuaikan dengan kata benda yang mengikutinya. 'infrastructure' adalah kata benda tak dapat dihitung (uncountable/tunggal), maka kata kerja tunggal masa lampau 'was' digunakan.

structure.questionText: _______ to intense ultraviolet radiation for prolonged periods, the synthetic polymer begins to rapidly degrade and lose its elasticity.
structure.explanation: Klausa keterangan waktu dapat direduksi jika subjeknya sama dengan subjek klausa utama. Polimer tersebut 'terpapar' (pasif). 'When exposed' adalah reduksi dari 'When it is exposed'.

structure.questionText: The chief nuclear engineer ordered the manual shutdown of the primary cooling system lest the reactor core _______ its critical temperature limit.
structure.explanation: Kata hubung 'lest' (agar tidak/supaya tidak) memicu penggunaan subjunctive mood. Kata kerja yang mengikutinya harus selalu dalam bentuk dasar (bare infinitive) 'exceed', terlepas dari subjek tunggal 'the reactor core'.

structure.questionText: The more robust the encryption algorithm utilized by the financial institution, _______ for cybercriminals to compromise the data.
structure.explanation: Pola perbandingan ganda (double comparative) menggunakan struktur 'The + comparative..., the + comparative...'. Frasa 'the more difficult it is' secara gramatikal sejajar dan benar susunannya.

structure.questionText: A highly complex and intensely debated concept in modern theoretical physics, _______ that subatomic particles can exist in multiple states simultaneously.
structure.explanation: Frasa apositif di awal ('A highly complex... physics') memberikan informasi mengenai subjek yang harus segera mengikutinya. 'quantum superposition dictates' memberikan subjek yang tepat beserta predikatnya.

structure.questionText: The bilateral trade negotiations _______ completely down, the two nations prepared for the immediate imposition of heavy tariffs.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah konstruksi absolute phrase (Subject + Participle). Karena negosiasi telah gagal (tuntas) sebelum persiapan tarif dimulai, perfect participle aktif 'having broken' digunakan.

structure.questionText: Despite _______ widespread public opposition to the proposed zoning laws, the city council passed the ordinance unanimously.
structure.explanation: Preposisi 'Despite' harus diikuti oleh noun, pronoun, atau gerund. Untuk menyatakan keberadaan (existential 'there' + 'be') dalam bentuk gerund setelah preposisi, digunakan frasa 'there being'.

structure.questionText: Such _______ the devastating magnitude of the earthquake that entire coastal communities were virtually wiped off the map in minutes.
structure.explanation: Struktur 'Such is / Such was' di awal kalimat memicu inversi untuk penekanan. Subjek yang mengikuti adalah 'the devastating magnitude' (tunggal), sehingga to be tunggal masa lampau 'was' digunakan.

structure.questionText: To strictly comply with the new corporate privacy regulations, the executive board had all outdated physical personnel files _______ immediately.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah struktur causative pasif ('have/had + object + past participle'). File personel tersebut 'dihancurkan' (shredded), bukan menghancurkan.

structure.questionText: The team of international geologists _______ the seismic anomaly near the tectonic plate boundary published their findings in a leading scientific journal.
structure.explanation: Klausa relatif aktif ('who were researching') direduksi menjadi present participle 'researching'. Frasa ini memodifikasi subjek utama 'The team of international geologists'.

structure.questionText: Only after the independent auditor meticulously reviewed the quarterly financial statements _______ the massive discrepancies in the accounting ledger.
options: did the board of directors realize
structure.explanation: Klausa yang diawali dengan frasa keterangan restriktif 'Only after' memicu inversi pada klausa utamanya. Auxiliary 'did' ditempatkan sebelum subjek 'the board of directors'.

structure.questionText: _______ the incredibly complex bureaucratic labyrinth to secure a patent requires both immense patience and substantial legal expertise.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini membutuhkan subjek untuk kata kerja 'requires'. Gerund 'Navigating' (Menavigasi) berfungsi sebagai kata benda (subjek) dan dapat memiliki objek langsungnya sendiri ('the... labyrinth').

structure.questionText: The comprehensive healthcare policy guarantees full medical coverage to _______ are legally classified as residents of the municipality.
structure.explanation: Kata ganti penunjuk 'those' diikuti oleh relative pronoun 'who' berfungsi menggantikan 'orang-orang yang'. Ini tepat digunakan karena klausa relatifnya memiliki kata kerja jamak ('are').

structure.questionText: The newly discovered deep-sea anglerfish utilizes bioluminescence to attract prey, _______ several other species inhabiting the abyssal zone.
structure.explanation: Saat membandingkan tindakan dengan menggunakan 'as' (seperti yang dilakukan...), struktur klausa setelahnya mengalami inversi (auxiliary + subjek). Karena subjeknya jamak ('several other species'), auxiliary yang dipakai adalah 'do'.

structure.questionText: By the time the prestigious academic journal finally agreed to publish the manuscript, the research team _______ the theoretical framework for over five years.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'By the time + simple past' menunjukkan suatu titik di masa lampau. Untuk menyatakan aksi yang sudah berlangsung selama durasi tertentu hingga titik masa lampau tersebut, digunakan past perfect continuous ('had been refining').

structure.questionText: The intricate cryptocurrency mining facility consumes significantly more electrical power annually _______.
options: than the entire neighboring town does
than does the entire neighboring town
structure.explanation: Dalam klausa perbandingan (menggunakan 'than' atau 'as'), inversi (auxiliary + subject) sering digunakan dalam bahasa Inggris formal yang menjadi standar TOEFL. 'than does the entire neighboring town' adalah struktur yang sangat tepat.

structure.questionText: The monumental literary work, written during a period of intense political turmoil, _______ to be the author's magnum opus.
structure.explanation: Kalimat ini membutuhkan predikat pasif ('dianggap secara luas'). 'is widely considered' melengkapi subjek 'The monumental literary work' setelah diselingi frasa apositif.

structure.questionText: It is strongly advised that any traveler heading to the tropical region _______ against the prevalent strains of malaria.
structure.explanation: Frasa 'strongly advised' memicu subjunctive mood. Pelancong tersebut harus 'divaksinasi' (makna pasif). Bentuk dasar dari to be pasif adalah 'be vaccinated'.

structure.questionText: The catastrophic failure of the automated system highlights the alarming extent _______ society has become dependent on artificial intelligence.
structure.explanation: Kata benda 'extent' (tingkat/sejauh mana) secara kolokatif (pasangan kata alami) selalu berpasangan dengan preposisi 'to', membentuk frasa 'to the extent' atau dalam klausa relatif menjadi 'the extent to which'.

structure.questionText: _______ the global stock market to crash unexpectedly, the central bank has prepared emergency liquidity protocols.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah bentuk inversi pengandaian tipe 2 ('If the global stock market were to crash...'). Inversi dengan pola 'Were + subject + to infinitive' tepat digunakan untuk menyatakan situasi hipotetis.

structure.questionText: _______ rigorously the new aerodynamic model is tested in the wind tunnel, real-world atmospheric variables can still produce unforeseen drag.
structure.explanation: Kata hubung 'However' dapat diikuti langsung oleh kata keterangan atau kata sifat ('However rigorously...') yang bermakna 'Sehebat/seketat apa pun'. 'No matter' harus diikuti oleh 'how' (No matter how rigorously...).

structure.questionText: _______ the strict stipulations outlined in the non-disclosure agreement, the former employee was legally barred from discussing the proprietary software.
structure.explanation: Frasa preposisional baku dan formal yang berarti 'Sesuai dengan' adalah 'In accordance with'.

structure.questionText: _______ about the extreme volatility of the digital currency market, the novice investor still chose to allocate his entire life savings into crypto assets.
structure.explanation: Investor pemula tersebut 'telah diperingatkan' (makna pasif) sebelum ia menginvestasikan uangnya. Perfect participle pasif 'Having been warned' adalah bentuk yang tepat.

structure.questionText: The ultimate efficiency of the newly installed solar grid depends largely on _______ the panels can track the trajectory of the sun.
structure.explanation: Preposisi 'on' diikuti oleh klausa kata benda (noun clause). Susunan klausa tanya (embedded question) yang benar adalah 'kata tanya (how accurately) + subjek (the panels) + verb (can track)' tanpa inversi tanya.

structure.questionText: The renowned ecologist advanced the field of conservation biology by analyzing behavioral patterns, synthesizing vast ecological datasets, and _______ comprehensive habitat restoration guidelines.
structure.explanation: Struktur paralel. Preposisi 'by' diikuti oleh serangkaian gerund: 'analyzing', 'synthesizing', dan karenanya yang ketiga harus berupa 'publishing'.

structure.questionText: _______ that the sudden mass extinction of the dinosaurs was catalyzed by a massive asteroid impact in the Yucatan Peninsula.
structure.explanation: Kalimat pasif impersonal menggunakan 'It' sebagai subjek ekspletif/palsu. 'It is hypothesized that...' (Dihubotesiskan bahwa...) adalah struktur formal baku dalam bahasa Inggris akademik.

structure.questionText: Beyond the treacherous, ice-covered peaks of the Himalayas _______ a secluded valley known for its unique microclimate and endemic flora.
structure.explanation: Inversi lokatif dengan frasa preposisi tempat di awal kalimat. Subjek aslinya adalah 'a secluded valley' (tunggal), maka kata kerjanya adalah 'lies' (terletak).

structure.questionText: So impenetrable _______ the thick layer of smog blanketing the industrial metropolis that flights were indefinitely grounded.
structure.explanation: Struktur penekanan 'So + adjective' (So impenetrable) di awal memicu inversi. Subjek kalimat 'the thick layer' (tunggal) didahului oleh to be tunggal. Mengingat anak kalimat menggunakan past tense ('were grounded'), maka to be 'was' digunakan.

structure.questionText: The defense attorney would rather the star witness _______ the controversial statement during the intense cross-examination yesterday.
structure.explanation: Bentuk 'would rather + subject' untuk pengandaian kejadian di masa lampau (yesterday) membutuhkan past perfect tense ('had not made').

structure.questionText: Renewable energy technologies, long considered a niche market, have transformed into a _______ growing sector of the global economy.
structure.explanation: Kata keterangan (adverb) dibutuhkan untuk memodifikasi kata sifat/partisipial 'growing' (sektor yang berkembang dengan cepat). 'Rapidly' adalah bentuk adverbia yang tepat.

structure.questionText: _______ a formidable challenge, navigating the intricate nuances of international maritime law is essential for global shipping companies.
structure.explanation: Konjungsi 'Albeit' (yang berarti meskipun/walaupun) unik karena dapat diikuti langsung oleh kata sifat atau frasa kata benda ('Albeit a formidable challenge' = Although it is a formidable challenge).

structure.questionText: Seldom in the annals of medical history _______ a vaccine been developed, tested, and distributed with such unprecedented speed.
structure.explanation: Adverbia negatif 'Seldom' memicu inversi. Mengingat kalimat utamanya menggunakan present perfect pasif ('been developed...'), dan subjeknya 'a vaccine' (tunggal), maka auxiliary 'has' diletakkan sebelum subjek.

structure.questionText: _______ the intricate sociocultural context of the Renaissance, one must immerse oneself in the primary literature of the period.
structure.explanation: Infinitive of purpose (Untuk memahami sepenuhnya...) digunakan di awal kalimat untuk menyatakan tujuan dari tindakan yang dilakukan oleh subjek di klausa utama.

structure.questionText: The critic noted that the film's ambiguous ending was not so much a narrative flaw _______ a deliberate choice to provoke audience debate.
structure.explanation: Idiom perbandingan 'not so much X as Y' digunakan untuk menyatakan bahwa suatu hal lebih tepat dideskripsikan sebagai Y daripada X. Pasangan tetap 'not so much' adalah 'as'.

structure.questionText: None of the highly sensitive laboratory equipment _______ during the sudden, severe power outage that struck the research facility.
structure.explanation: Untuk kata ganti kuantitas 'None of...', kata kerja menyesuaikan dengan kata benda yang mengikutinya. 'equipment' adalah kata benda tak terhitung (uncountable/selalu tunggal). Karena kejadian di masa lalu (struck), maka 'was damaged' digunakan.

structure.questionText: _______ any severe adverse reactions to the experimental medication, patients are instructed to contact the lead physician immediately.
structure.explanation: Ini adalah pengandaian tipe 1 yang diinversi ('Should they experience' = 'If they experience'). Klausa utama berbentuk kalimat perintah (imperative), yang mana sangat umum berpasangan dengan kondisional tipe 1/Should.

structure.questionText: The geopolitical crisis has created a volatile situation _______ diplomatic immunity is no longer guaranteed for foreign envoys.
structure.explanation: Kata ganti relatif 'where' (atau 'in which') digunakan untuk merujuk pada suatu keadaan, situasi, atau tempat abstrak ('a volatile situation') di mana sesuatu terjadi.

structure.questionText: The rapid proliferation of quantum computing technology threatens to render current cryptographic security protocols completely _______.
structure.explanation: Kata kerja 'render' (membuat/menyebabkan menjadi) diikuti oleh objek (current... protocols) dan object complement (pelengkap objek) berupa kata sifat (adjective). 'Obsolete' (usang) adalah bentuk kata sifat yang tepat.

structure.questionText: In recognition of her groundbreaking contributions to theoretical physics, Dr. Aris _______ exclusive access to the highly restricted particle accelerator.
structure.explanation: Kalimat pasif dengan dua objek. Dr. Aris 'diberikan' (was granted) akses. Jika aktif, polanya 'They granted Dr. Aris exclusive access'. Karena Dr. Aris adalah penerima aksi, bentuk pasif digunakan.

structure.questionText: Despite extensive forensic analysis, investigators still do not definitively know _______ that ignited the devastating warehouse fire.
structure.explanation: Dalam pertanyaan yang disematkan (embedded question) atau klausa kata benda sebagai objek, susunannya adalah afirmatif (pernyataan), bukan susunan tanya. Polanya adalah 'kata tanya (what) + subjek (the catalyst) + verb (was)'.

structure.questionText: Unlike the cumbersome, mechanical prototypes of the past century, the modern robotic exoskeleton is agile, highly intuitive, and _______.
structure.explanation: Paralelisme. Tiga elemen yang menjelaskan 'the modern robotic exoskeleton' harus memiliki kelas kata yang sama. 'agile' dan 'intuitive' adalah kata sifat (adjectives). Maka elemen ketiga haruslah frasa kata sifat, yaitu 'remarkably silent'.

structure.questionText: Hardly _______ the controversial press conference when outraged stakeholders began demanding the CEO's immediate resignation.
structure.explanation: Adverbia negatif 'Hardly' di awal kalimat memicu inversi. Untuk menyatakan satu kejadian baru saja selesai sebelum kejadian lain terjadi (berpasangan dengan 'when' + past tense), digunakan past perfect tense ('had + subjek + verb 3').

structure.questionText: The intricate symbiotic relationship between the fungi and the root systems of the ancient redwood trees _______ extensively documented by botanists.
structure.explanation: Subjek utama adalah 'The intricate symbiotic relationship' (tunggal). Frasa-frasa preposisi setelahnya tidak memengaruhi jumlah subjek. Karena subjeknya tunggal dan kalimatnya pasif, 'has been' adalah auxiliary yang tepat.

structure.questionText: The accelerated development of autonomous vehicles, coupled with the widespread implementation of 5G networks, _______ a complete paradigm shift in urban transportation.
structure.explanation: Subjek utama adalah 'The accelerated development' (tunggal). Frasa penyela yang diawali dengan 'coupled with...' tidak membuat subjek menjadi jamak. Oleh karena itu, kata kerja tunggal 'has precipitated' digunakan.
